[Calling write_report(title="Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary", content="# Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)  
**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28

## Patient dosing

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose per administration (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick assessment

- Current dosing parameters are internally consistent in the latest config.
- No explicit dose-hold, toxicity, or instability flags are present in this file.
- CU-001 and CU-002 are documented as clinically stable/responding.
- CU-003 is newly enrolled and on a more frequent schedule (q2w), so that patient likely warrants the closest follow-up.

## PK model stability note

Based **only on the latest dosing configuration file**, nothing appears obviously out of range or unstable. However, this file is a parameter snapshot, **not** a live PK model health check. A true stability assessment would require current model outputs, monitoring telemetry, or recent validation runs.
", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and saved a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

Quick snapshot:

- CU-001: 12.4 kg, 0.15 mg/kg → 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, clearance 3.2 mL/min
- CU-002: 9.1 kg, 0.12 mg/kg → 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 15.7 kg, 0.18 mg/kg → 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, clearance 4.1 mL/min

Status notes:
- CU-001: stable, 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: responding well, weight gain improving
- CU-003: new enrollment, first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK stability: based on the latest dosing config alone, nothing looks obviously unstable or inconsistent, and there are no dose-hold/toxicity flags in that file. But I haven’t checked live PK monitoring or run a fresh validation here, so I can’t fully confirm model stability from the config snapshot alone.

If you want, I can format this into an email draft once you give me Dr. Martinez’s address.
